commands.review_summary:
The PR narrows `secrets apply` `.env` scrubbing from all known secret env vars to env vars for migrated providers and adds a shared-value collision regression test.

PR surface: Source +13, Tests +105. Total +118 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main's value-plus-global-key matching explains the reported over-delete, and source inspection of the PR shows a new auth-profile under-scrub path; I did not run local tests because this review is read-only.
